source_name: Code4rena Reserve Protocol Invitational Findings and Analysis Report (2023-07)
finding_title: CurveVolatileCollateral Collateral status can be manipulated by flashloan attack
summary: Attacker can make the CurveVolatileCollateral enter the status of IFFY/DISABLED. It will cause the basket to rebalance and sell off all the CurveVolatileCollateral.
root_cause: flash-loan-manipulable Curve volatile pool pricing can push collateral status across thresholds during a single transaction
broken_invariants: collateral status checks must not depend on instantly manipulable pool balances or spot prices
flash-loan changes to a Curve volatile pool must not be able to mark collateral sound or unsound incorrectly
default/delay logic must be based on manipulation-resistant prices
attack_preconditions: the affected Reserve collateral/plugin/wrapper is deployed or configured in an RToken basket
the report-described oracle, reward, wrapper, or integration edge case is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, trader, or protocol participant able to trigger the affected pricing/trading/reward/withdrawal flow
trigger_actions: execute or wait for the report-described state transition
observe mispricing, reward misallocation, fund lock, or availability failure

impact.description: Attacker can make the CurveVolatileCollateral enter the status of IFFY/DISABLED. It will cause the basket to rebalance and sell off all the CurveVolatileCollateral.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify the exact collateral plugin/wrapper is in scope and configured
check whether oracle freshness, decimals, or external integration assumptions differ in the current target
confirm the issue affects value movement, redemption availability, or reward ownership rather than a harmless view mismatch
mitigations: I think the de-pegged status in the volatile pool may be unimportant. It will be temporary and have little impact on the price of outside lp tokens. After all, override the _anyDepeggedOutsidePool to check the lp price might be a good idea. ### Assessed type Context

snippets.note: link preserved from Code4rena report or mitigation review
